message:
fix(slot-registry): strengthen GA release guard with lineage digest validation, authority consistency checks, and deferred event emission

slot_registry.rs:
- Add expected_former_delegate_digest() helper that resolves the
  expected delegate digest from rollback_target or promotion lineage
  history, enabling lineage chain verification during GA guard checks
- Add InconsistentAuthority error and pre-promotion check that native
  required capabilities must be a subset of permitted capabilities
- Expand core-slot GA guard evaluation to validate former delegate
  digest match, signature verification, equivalence suite pass, and
  delegate fallback unreachability when a known prior delegate exists
- Defer per-slot event emission until after non-core delegate limit
  breaching so that limit-based blocking reasons are captured in the
  audit events (previously events were emitted before the limit check)
- Add non-core delegate limit detail message with actual vs configured
  count for operator diagnostics

slot_registry_integration.rs:
- Add promote_rejects_inconsistent_native_authority test
- Add ga_release_guard_lineage_digest_mismatch_blocks test
- Add ga_release_guard_delegate_fallback_reachable_blocks test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
